title: First Lineup
description: Build your first team.

title: Debut
description: Finish your first run.

title: Lift-Off
description: Win your first tournament.

title: Getting Started
description: Play 10 runs.

title: Regular
description: Play 50 runs.

title: Lifer
description: Play 200 runs.

title: Contender
description: Win 5 tournaments.

title: Dynasty
description: Win 15 tournaments.

title: Hall of Famer
description: Win 50 tournaments.

title: Series Veteran
description: Win 50 individual games.

title: Game Wizard
description: Win 200 individual games.

title: Goal Getter
description: Score 100 goals across all your runs.

title: Sharpshooter
description: Score 250 goals across all your runs.

title: Goal Machine
description: Score 500 goals across all your runs.

title: Proving Ground
description: Win a tournament on Hard.

title: All-Timer
description: Win a tournament on Legacy.

title: Eternal
description: Win 10 tournaments on Legacy.

title: Regional Legend
description: Win a region-locked tournament on Legacy.

title: Speed Run
description: Win a match in Quick Draft.

title: Flawless Swiss
description: Go 3-0 in the Swiss stage.

title: Daily Grind
description: Win a Daily Challenge.

title: Streak Master
description: Win the Daily Challenge 7 days in a row.

title: Statement Win
description: Win a match by 7 goals or more.

title: Untouchable
description: Win a tournament without losing a single series.

title: Stone Wall
description: Win a tournament without conceding a goal.

title: Loaded
description: Finish a run with 3 special cards on your team.

title: Hat-Trick
description: Have a player score 3 goals in one match.

title: Four-Star
description: Have a player score 4 goals in one match.

title: One-Man Army
description: Have one player score all your team's goals in a match (3 or more).

title: Game Seven Ice
description: Win a final in game 7.

title: Reverse Sweep
description: Win a series after falling behind by two games.

title: The Long Way
description: Win a tournament out of the lower bracket.

title: Ever-Present
description: Have a player score in every game of a tournament.

title: Overtime Hero
description: Win a final in game 7 overtime.

title: On the Wire
description: Win a final decided by a single goal.

title: Giant Slayer
description: Beat a team with a higher overall than yours.

title: Perfect Sync
description: Build a team with perfect chemistry.

title: In Perfect Sync
description: Win a tournament with perfect chemistry.

title: Total Strangers
description: Win a tournament with no chemistry at all.

title: Old School
description: Win a tournament with only early-era players (2019 or earlier).

title: New Wave
description: Win a tournament with only open-era players (2020 onward).

title: South American Steel
description: Build a team of three South American players.

title: European Power
description: Build a team of three European players.

title: North American Core
description: Build a team of three North American players.

title: Sub-Saharan Pride
description: Build a team of three Sub-Saharan African players.

title: MENA Force
description: Build a team of three MENA players.

title: Oceanic Unit
description: Build a team of three Oceanic players.

title: APAC Assembly
description: Build a team of three Asia-Pacific players.

title: Champions Only
description: Build a team of three world-champion-tier players.

title: Reunion
description: Build a team of three players from the same org.

title: First Pull
description: Unlock your first special card.

title: Collector
description: Unlock 15 special cards.

title: Curator
description: Unlock 50 special cards.

title: Completionist
description: Unlock every special card.

title: Behind the Game
description: Unlock the Creator card.

title: Supersonic Legend
description: Reach the Supersonic Legend rank.
